title: CSO Violation - Workflow Summary in Description
description: Skill description contained workflow keywords that caused Claude to follow the description instead of reading the full skill body

original_violation.description: Use when executing plans - dispatches subagent per task with code review between tasks

why_it_failed: Description included workflow details ('dispatches', 'per task', 'code review between tasks'). This caused 'expensive wallpaper' - Claude read the description, thought it understood the workflow, and never loaded the full skill body. The skill became useless.
fix_applied: Removed all workflow keywords from description. Description now focuses solely on WHEN to use (triggering conditions), not HOW it works (process steps).

correct_example.description: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session

test_cases.test_name: No CSO violations in any skill

prevention.automated_check: validate_cso.py runs in pre-commit via git-commit → skill-review
prevention.checklist_item: Deep analysis checklist includes CSO compliance check
